channel.title: Simulation on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Simulation on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Art of Strategic Forgetting: World Models and the Future of AI
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: AI pioneer Yann LeCun argues that intelligence is the art of strategic forgetting. Discover why ‘world models’ and hierarchical abstraction are the keys to human-level AI.

item.title: Simulation Standard for Business Process Management
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A foundational proposal arguing that while BPMN standardized process ‘flows’, the industry lacked a standard for the ‘physics’ of simulation—resources, costs, and time.
